name: @hanhnd/agent-kit
description: Agent Kit MCP server for software development agent workflows

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc && npm run bundle
scripts.bundle: esbuild src/kit-server.ts src/kit-cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outdir=dist --external:node:* --external:better-sqlite3 --external:sqlite-vec --external:fastembed --external:node-llama-cpp --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.test: tsc && node --test $(find src/memory/__tests__ src/tools/__tests__ -name '*.test.ts' | sed 's#^src/#dist/#; s#\.ts$#.js#' | tr '\n' ' ')
